evidence.quote: Ambavirumab/Romisevirumab combination therapy... maintain therapeutic activity against a variety of mutant strains, including Omicron
combination of cryo-EM and next-generation sequencing can quickly obtain key epitope information

issues.claim: chose to use Cryo-EM combined with next-generation sequencing to perform complex structure analysis of S-ACE2-antibody... antibodies: ambavirumab, romisevirumab
issues.reason: The text describes Ambavirumab/Romisevirumab as approved drugs guided by Cryo-EM [93-96], and separately describes a recent study using Cryo-EM+NGS [98]. The text does not explicitly link the NGS method to the development of Ambavirumab/Romisevirumab.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Separate the Ambavirumab example (Cryo-EM guidance) from the NGS method example (general recent study), or remove the specific antibody names from the NGS method step.

step_scores.label: partially_supported

evidence.quote: Fontana et al. [116] reported the structure of the cytoplasmic ring of the nucleus pore complex by integrative cryo-EM and AlphaFold... at 6–7 Å resolution
Lupas et al. [115]... AlphaFold2-produced template solved the problem with extremely high accuracy... phasing problems

issues.claim: AlphaFold-produced template solved phasing problems and guided model fitting of the CR map
issues.reason: The text attributes 'solving phasing problems' to Lupas et al. [115] (archaeal receptor), and 'guide model fitting' to Fontana et al. [116] (NPC). The step conflates the observation of Lupas with the target of Fontana.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Specify that AlphaFold guided model fitting for NPC (Fontana), and solved phasing problems for the archaeal receptor (Lupas), or separate into two steps.
